column1: Before sending out transports the destination world must already be colonized with a colony base or by another player. Furthermore, if the planet is hostile, you must have the appropriate landing technology.

column1: MASTER'S NOTES
column2: 指揮官筆記

column1: Now that your home planet has a substantial population and industry, you should begin allocating resources toward building missle bases by increasing the planet's defense ratio.
column2: 既然你的母星已有可觀的人口與工業,你應開始將資源投入建造飛彈基地,方法是提高該行星的防禦比例。

column1: Now that you have made contact with another race, you can negotiate with them for treaties and trade agreements to improve relations (see Audience underneath the Races screen).
column2: 既然你已與其他種族接觸,便可與其談判條約與貿易協定以改善關係(見種族畫面下方的會談)。

column1: As technology advances you should be sure to scrap obsolete designs.   Ships that are 10 or more levels behind existing enemy technology are  next to useless.
column2: 隨著科技進步,你應確實報廢過時的設計。落後現有敵方科技 10 級以上的艦艇幾乎毫無用處。

column1: Although you have discovered a star system that you can not yet form a colony on, you may still reach systems beyond it by stationing a ship with refueling tanks there
column2: 雖然你已發現一個尚無法殖民的恆星系,但只要在該處部署一艘配備補給油箱的艦艇,仍可抵達其後方的恆星系

column1: To remain competitive with your enemies, you must not fall behind in  the technology race, especially in weapons and computer technology.
column2: 要與敵人維持競爭力,你絕不能在科技競賽中落後,尤其是武器與電腦科技。

column1: Now that you have developed a weapon  better than lasers, you should design a new ship that uses the improved  weapon.
column2: 既然你已開發出優於雷射的武器,就應設計使用該改良武器的新艦艇。

column1: Now that you have developed a new engine type, you should design new ships to take advantage of the increased mobility.
column2: 既然你已開發出新的引擎類型,就應設計新艦艇以善用提升後的機動力。

column1: Now that you have found a star system suitable for colonization, send your colony ship there to form a new colony.
column2: 既然你已找到適合殖民的恆星系,就派遣殖民艦前往建立新殖民地。

column1: With the increased growth of your industry, waste reduction will begin costing an increasing percentage of your production. Reduce the amount of waste with construction and planetology research.
column2: 隨著工業成長,廢料削減將佔去越來越高比例的生產量。以建設與行星學研究來減少廢料量。

column1: Clicking anywhere on a colony exits to planet production for that colony
column2: 點擊殖民地任意處即離開至該殖民地的行星生產畫面

column1: With the invention of planetary shields, you should begin allocating resources to defense in order to build the shields.
column2: 隨著行星護盾的發明,你應開始將資源分配至防禦以建造護盾。

column1: Now that you have developed Soil Enrichment technology, you should increase the ecology ratio on planets with standard environments to change them into fertile environments. Any resources allocated to ecology beyond the requirements to eliminate waste are
column2: 既然你已開發出土壤強化科技,就應提高標準環境行星的生態比例,將其轉變為肥沃環境。分配至生態、超出消除廢料所需的任何資源都會

column1: With the invention of Atmosheric Terraforming technology, you should increase the ecology ratio on planets with hostile environments to change them into standard environments. Any resources allocated beyond the requirements to eliminate waste are used to t
column2: 隨著大氣地形改造科技的發明,你應提高敵意環境行星的生態比例,將其轉變為標準環境。超出消除廢料所需的任何資源都會用來

column1: With the development of Advanced Soil Enrichment you can convert standard and fertile planets into gais which double poplulation growth rates. Any resources allocated beyond the requirements to eliminate industrial waste are used to transform the environme
column2: 隨著進階土壤強化的開發,你可將標準與肥沃行星轉為蓋亞行星,使人口成長率加倍。超出消除工業廢料所需的任何資源都會用來改造環境

column1: With the development of Star Gates it becomes essential that you begin building star gates on all of your planets by selecting star gates in the space dock to build instead of ships. Star gates are unsurpassed for accelerating fleet deployments.
column2: 隨著星門的開發,你必須開始在所有行星上建造星門,方法是在太空船塢中選擇建造星門而非艦艇。星門在加速艦隊部署上無與倫比。

column1: Any time you develop either Reduced Industrial Waste or Ecological Restoration technology you should review all of your planet's ecology ratios to decrease where needed.
column2: 每當你開發出工業廢料削減或生態復原科技,都應檢視所有行星的生態比例,在需要處予以降低。
